assertions.description: Output includes a primary Midjourney prompt with specific style descriptors, technical references (film stock, lens, medium), and at least one lighting descriptor
A breakdown section explains which prompt elements produce which visual characteristics
Aspect ratio is set and a Next Step note provides concrete actions including generation count guidance

assertion_results.note: Prompt includes high-contrast B&W, available light, Tri-X 400 film stock reference, close-up portrait
Breakdown table explains each element's contribution to Nachtwey aesthetic
4:5 ratio set; Next Step: run 4 generations at --s 200
Pastel palette, symmetrical composition, specific set-design language for Anderson aesthetic
Breakdown explains symmetry and palette elements
Geometric abstraction, concrete texture, dramatic natural light, Ilford HP5 film reference
Breakdown explains Binet's specific approach to light and material
4:5 set; Next Step includes alternative prompt testing recommendation

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
